title: Protein Lysate Preparation Protocol (Culture)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ce11v","text":"This protocol details about the protein lysate of the culture.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"alq4b","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5anui","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Wash cells using cold PBS followed by ice-cold 1x TNE lysis buffer containing 1% SDS, 0.5% NP-40, 0.5% DOC and protease/phosphatase inhibitors. TNE lysis buffer: A B 1 Tris 50 mM      2 NaCl 150 mM     3 EDTA pH at 7.4 5 mM
Use cell scraper to remove all detached cells and keep On ice for 00:05:00 .
Transfer lysates to 1.7 mL collection tubes and sonicate for 2 pulses (at 20% amplitude, 00:00:10 each), heat for 00:10:00 on hot plate ( 100 °C ) and centrifuge at 16000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Transfer resulting supernatants to new tubes (final total lysate).
Perform BCA protein assay following manufacturers instruction and prepare 1xLaemlli samples of standardized concentration for SDS-PAGE.
creator: Jane Balster
